items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Top candidate q0350 ('destroyed' license) is close but source says 'damaged' — legal nuance could differ. Not enough confidence to approve existing qid; needs human/legal check. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0350 uses 'destroyed' vs source 'damaged' — potential legal difference, so top match not accepted automatically.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks if one must honk and accelerate at hill top; q0195 states that behavior is Wrong/False. Maps to French option B (No). Good semantic match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question about sudden stop on wet/slippery road — correct hazard is sliding and causing accident. q0110 correctText = 'cause sideways slide and traffic accident' which maps to French source option D.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Legal/administrative claim (suspension of Carte Grise for missing insurance sticker) is jurisdiction-specific and top candidates are not semantically aligned; require subject-matter review. Rejected top matcher: No top candidate with clear matching legal semantics; cannot approve automatically.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement about placing triangle 'less than 50 m behind' conflicts with candidate items (some indicate within/at least 50 m). Ambiguous/legal detail; keep unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Top candidates disagree about the 50 m direction (within vs at least); cannot select automatically.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Which document authorizes police to immobilize vehicle — candidate matches are weak and legal practice varies (ID vs Carte Grise). Insufficient signal to approve; requires human/legal confirmation. Rejected top matcher: Top candidates are semantically distant and do not clearly map to the source options; cannot accept automatically.
